content:
graph TD
    subgraph MCP[Microservice Collaboration Platform]
        MCPNode[Central MCP Core]
        SharedMemory[Shared Memory]
        TaskRouter[Task Router]
    end
    subgraph Coding[Code Integration]
        CodeEditor[Code Editor]
        CodeExecution[Code Execution]
        CI_CD[CI/CD Pipeline]
    end
    subgraph Emails[Email Workflow]
        EmailComposer[Email Composer]
        EmailScheduler[Email Scheduler]
        EmailAnalytics[Email Analytics]
    end
    subgraph Marketing[Marketing Automation]
        CampaignManager[Campaign Manager]
        LeadScoring[Lead Scoring]
        AIBot[AI Marketing Bot]
    end
    subgraph AI[Autonomous AI]
        AIController[AIGovernance]
        DecisionMaker[Decision Engine]
        FeedbackLoop[Feedback Loop]
    end
    subgraph Infrastructure[Support Systems]
        DB[(Database)]
        Auth[Authentication]
        Logging[Monitoring]
    end
    MCPNode --> SharedMemory
    MCPNode --> TaskRouter
    TaskRouter --> CodeEditor
    TaskRouter --> EmailComposer
    TaskRouter --> CampaignManager
    TaskRouter --> AIController
    CodeEditor --> CodeExecution
    CodeExecution --> CI_CD
    EmailComposer --> EmailScheduler
    EmailScheduler --> EmailAnalytics
    CampaignManager --> LeadScoring
    LeadScoring --> AIBot
    AIController --> DecisionMaker
    DecisionMaker --> FeedbackLoop
    FeedbackLoop --> MCPNode
    MCPNode --> Auth
    MCPNode --> Logging
    MCPNode --> DB
title: EXECUTION BLUEPRINT
